content: Reviewer-gated visualization package: deliver exactly three business-relevant charts (trend, segment comparison, and distribution), each saved as PNG with a JSON sidecar containing title, chart_type, x_axis label and values, y_axis label and values, and one-sentence description. Include a QA checklist and revise if any item fails.
